section.heading: Coordination and consolidation of post-seizure administration

content.p: The Attorney General and the Secretary of the Treasury shall take such action as may be necessary to develop and maintain a joint plan to coordinate and consolidate post-seizure administration of property seized under this subchapter, subchapter II, or provisions of the customs laws relating to controlled substances.

section.sourceCredit: (Pub. L. 91–513, title II, § 517, as added Pub. L. 100–690, title VI, § 6078(a), Nov. 18, 1988, 102 Stat. 4325.)
